THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POOLE, ROY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EASLEY, DORIS B. EASLEY, RODERICK AS TRUSTEE OF THE DORIS B. EASLEY 1988 TRUST THE DORIS B. EASLEY 1988 TRUST $90,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $90,000.00, AS EQUITABLE LIEN. DEFTS TO PAY TAXES, INS. & UPKEEP ON THE PROPERTY FR THE DATE OF BONITA'S DEATH. ALTERNATIVELY, THE COURT GRANTS ROY POOLE THE EQUITABLE REMEDY OF LIEN OF $75,000.00 ON PROPERTY LOCATED AT 280 MINERVA PLUS RIGHT TO RESIDE FOR THE LIFE OF DORIS EASLEY. IF ROY POOLE ELECTS TO CONTINUE TO RESIDE, ROY POOLE IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE TAXES, INS. AND UPKEEP FROM THE DATE OF BONITA'S DEATH UNTIL HE VACATES. ON EASLEY'S X-COMPLT, JUDGMENT IS GRANTED IN FAVOR OF X-COMPLAINANT EASLEY ON THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION TO QUIET TITLE. SEE SCANNED DOC FOR COMPLETE RULING ON COMPLAINT & CROSS-COMPLAINT.

EASLEY 1988 TRUST THE DORIS B. EASLEY 1988 TRUST $90,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $90,000.00, AS EQUITABLE LIEN. DEFTS TO PAY TAXES, INS. & UPKEEP ON THE PROPERTY FR THE DATE OF BONITA'S DEATH. ALTERNATIVELY, THE COURT GRANTS ROY POOLE THE EQUITABLE REMEDY OF LIEN OF $75,000.00 ON PROPERTY LOCATED AT 280 MINERVA PLUS RIGHT TO RESIDE FOR THE LIFE OF DORIS EASLEY. IF ROY POOLE ELECTS TO CONTINUE TO RESIDE, ROY POOLE IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE TAXES, INS. AND UPKEEP FROM THE DATE OF BONITA'S DEATH UNTIL HE VACATES. ON EASLEY'S X-COMPLT, JUDGMENT IS GRANTED IN FAVOR OF X-COMPLAINANT EASLEY ON THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION TO QUIET TITLE. SEE SCANNED DOC FOR COMPLETE RULING ON COMPLAINT & CROSS-COMPLAINT.
